summary: Complete frontend testing of G-Digital website iteration 3 - La Factoria page and homepage updates implemented excellently with 95% success rate

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile hamburger menu button not visible on 390px viewport - may be CSS responsive breakpoint issue
ui_bugs.note: Desktop navigation works perfectly, this only affects mobile menu visibility

passed_tests: La Factoria page loads perfectly at /soluciones/factoria with all required sections:
- Hero section with 'Prioridad Comercial • Oceano Azul' badge, main heading, and Trust API CTA
- Statistics counters (4 microservicios, 298 escenarios, 18 sectores, ~45ms) with working animations
- Deuda Legal table section with 8 risk scenarios comparing 'Sin Trust API' vs 'Con Trust API'
- The Stack: 4 Microservicios eIDAS section (Evidence Manager, Signature Manager, Notification Manager, Custody Manager)
- Legal argument table 'Inversion de la Carga de la Prueba' with Trust API highlighted rows
- Tech specs section showing 99.99% uptime, ~45ms latencia, SOC 2, JSON format
- Integrations grid with 6 systems: SAP, Workday, Dynamics, SharePoint, n8n/Zapier, Power Automate
- Tres horizontes de valor section (H1 Prevencion, H2 Cumplimiento, H3 Infraestructura)
- Modelos de entrada section (POC/Piloto, Departamental recommended, Enterprise)
- Final CTA 'Solicitar Demo de Trust API' section
Homepage navigation dropdown shows La Factoria with special styling (bg-accent/5, border-accent/10) at the top
Homepage solutions section displays full-width La Factoria card (md:col-span-12) with dark gradient background
La Factoria card shows correct stats: 298 escenarios and ~45ms latencia with proper styling
New Deuda Legal section on homepage with 4 risk items and legal argument card (Sin vs Con Trust API)
Legal argument card shows proper contrast between 'Sin Trust API' (papel mojado) and 'Con Trust API' (evidencia blindada)
Navigation to La Factoria page works perfectly from both dropdown and homepage card
All existing pages still work correctly:
- /contacto loads with contact form and company info
- /nosotros loads with company information and team details
- /recursos loads with blog articles and filter functionality
- /soluciones/confianza-digital loads with eIDAS trust services info
- /soluciones/contract-tech loads with contract lifecycle management details
- /soluciones/activos-digitales loads with digital assets tokenization info
- /soluciones/legaltech-ia loads with AI governance and compliance details
Footer includes La Factoria (Trust API) link in solutions section
Counter animations work correctly - showing final values instead of starting at 0
Clean URL routing works properly for La Factoria page (/soluciones/factoria)
Responsive design functions well on desktop (1920x1080) viewports
Professional design implementation maintains brand consistency
Tailwind CSS styling, proper spacing, and typography work correctly
Glassmorphism effects and gradients display properly in hero sections
All CTA buttons correctly link to contacto page as expected
Page load times are excellent with no performance issues detected
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Mobile hamburger menu visibility issue on 390px viewport - check CSS responsive breakpoints for lg:hidden class on nav-toggle-mobile button
